headline: Microsoft’s Xbox reset is pivoting Obsidian to make Fallout instead of Avowed
summary: Microsoft's Xbox division is undergoing a major "reset" with significant layoffs. Obsidian Entertainment is now developing a new Fallout title. This shift means canceling multiple other projects, including "Avowed."

headline: America’s cheapest new EV is smaller than a ping-pong table and tops out at 19mph
summary: The Fiat Topolino is launching as America's cheapest new electric vehicle. It's extremely compact, described as smaller than a ping-pong table. The EV has a limited top speed of 19mph, highlighting trade-offs for affordability.

headline: Cockroaches will learn to fear my SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable
summary: A reviewer uses a SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable to automate turning on lights. This robotic switch-flipper helps them combat cockroaches at night. The device provides a hands-free solution to quickly illuminate rooms.

headline: If Microsoft sold off Xbox, who would even buy it?
summary: Microsoft is making deep cuts to its Xbox business, laying off 3,200 employees. Four studios are being shed as part of Xbox's "dramatic cuts." The article speculates on potential buyers if Microsoft were to divest Xbox.

headline: Skybound Unveils Surprise G.I. Joe and Tomb Raider Comic Crossover
summary: Skybound Entertainment announced an unexpected comic book crossover. The new series will feature characters from G.I. Joe and Tomb Raider. Fans can get an early look at "G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero/Tomb Raider."

headline: Save 63% Off the LG Xboom Grab Core Waterproof Portable Speaker, Now Just $51.77
summary: Get a massive 63% discount on the LG Xboom Grab Core speaker. This waterproof portable speaker is now available for only $51.77. The deal is perfect for summer and outdoor activities.

headline: Emmy Nominations 2026: The Full List for Every Major Category
summary: The 78th Primetime Emmy Awards nominations have been announced. HBO is leading the charge with the most nominations across categories. The full list of nominees is now available for 2026.

headline: Save Nearly 60% Off the Logitech G923 Racing Wheel and Pedal Set for PlayStation and PC
summary: A significant deal offers nearly 60% off the Logitech G923 racing wheel. The set includes a racing wheel and pedal set, compatible with PlayStation and PC. This deal is ideal for enhancing racing game experiences like Forza Horizon 6.

headline: Trump threatens more strikes on Iran as Tehran warns of 'fearless' response
summary: Former President Trump threatened further strikes on Iran during a NATO summit. He stated that any future US action would be "over quickly." Tehran has responded, warning of a "fearless" counter-response.

headline: Bowen: For all his bluster, Trump has no better option than talks with Iran
summary: BBC's Jeremy Bowen argues that talks are Trump's best option with Iran despite his rhetoric. The negotiating process is described as fragile and complex. Recent US strikes highlight the difficulty in reaching an agreement.

headline: UK to change law so ringleader of Rochdale grooming gang can be deported
summary: The UK plans to amend the 1971 Immigration Act. This change aims to allow for the deportation of the Rochdale grooming gang ringleader. The Home Secretary is expected to outline the legislative changes soon.

headline: Farage denies stunt as Reform proposes August by-election date
summary: Nigel Farage of Reform UK denied accusations of a political "stunt." Reform UK has proposed an August date for a by-election. Farage stated it's "only fair" to let the electorate judge him.
